description: Passing a fresh object/array literal as a Context provider value, forcing every consumer to rerender on each provider render.
body: Failure mode: the provider's value is constructed inline (e.g. value={{user, setUser}}) so its reference changes every render and all consumers rerender regardless of what they read. Detection signals: profiler shows unrelated consumers committing on each provider render; janky typing or scrolling; value built without useMemo. Do not pass inline literals as context values for high-fan-out contexts. Safer fallback: memoize the value on its real dependencies, split frequently-changing state into a separate context, and verify consumers commit only when their slice changes.
